title: galium galioides
intro: Galium galioides, also known as Eastern Yellowcress or False Yellowcress, is a flowering plant in the bedstraw family Galium. It is native to eastern North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Galium galioides include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Galium galioides can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
